title: Weyerhaeuser to Release First Quarter Results on April 27
text: Webcast and conference call on April 28 at 7 a.m. PT (10 a.m.

title: Why I Quit Buying Rental Properties To Buy REITs Instead - Part 2
text: REITs are better investments than rental properties in most cases. But there are exceptions.

title: Weyerhaeuser: Potential Earnings Trough In 2023
text: Sales for Weyerhaeuser were down 0.2% Y/Y in 2022, with adjusted EBITDA, diluted EPS before special items and adjusted Funds Available for Distribution all down 10-11% Y/Y. Lumber futures have erased COVID-19 gains and are back to 2019 levels.
